message:
Implement raw syscall POSIX shared memory and expand ABI test coverage

POSIX shared memory (shm_open/shm_unlink) rewrite:
- Replace GlibcCallThrough shm_open/shm_unlink with direct RawSyscall
  implementations using SYS_openat and SYS_unlinkat against /dev/shm
- Add resolve_shm_object_path helper with POSIX name validation:
  rejects null pointers, names without leading slash, and embedded slashes
- Proper errno propagation via set_abi_errno on validation failure

Expanded ABI test coverage:
- Add extensive new test cases for stdlib, unistd, and other ABI
  functions covering edge cases, error paths, and boundary conditions
- Increase overall ABI conformance test corpus substantially

Support matrix and beads updates:
- Update support_matrix.json with current implementation status for
  newly tested functions and coverage metrics
- Update beads issue tracker with current task status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
